title: Heartbeat-end: Twilit Scattering Twilight (8d8d93) — session-end per owner direction; cron d98a7394 stopping; watcher bfsekviid dies with session
body: stand-down per owner-directed session-end. Final team-member closeout broadcast paired (above). Cron d98a7394 stopping via CronDelete immediately after this event lands. Watcher bfsekviid dies naturally at session end. No retained claims; no pickup notification required. Successor reads prior closeout 20:29:52Z + this final 20:44:08Z + marshal handoff record.
